CustomField.description: Comma-separated recipient list using prefix syntax. Supports user, group, profile, and field prefixes.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Comma-separated recipient list. Mix any prefixes: user:<Username> (active users); group:<DeveloperName> (Public Group or Queue members, not Roles, no nested group recursion); profile:<Profile Name> (active users on that profile); profiledev:<Profile Name> (same as profile:, kept for compat); field:<relationship.path> (dot-notation to a User Id on the record, up to 5 hops, e.g. OwnerId, Account.Owner.ManagerId). Malformed tokens are skipped silently.
CustomField.label: Recipients
